mapper.sql: select id, tenant_id, product_id, device_id, channel_id, channel_name, register_time, device_type, channel_type, data_type, city_code, civil_code, manufacture, model, owner, password, parent_id, ip_address, port, ptz_type, ptz_type_text, status, longitude, latitude, stream_id, play_url, proxy_url, has_audio, has_broadcast, ctrl_config, extend_info, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from common_channel
mapper.select: where device_id = #{deviceId} and length(channel_id)>14 and civil_code=#{parentId} and del_flag = '0'
where device_id=#{deviceId} and civil_code not in (select civil_code from common_channel where del_flag = '0' and device_id=#{deviceId} group by civil_code)
select min(length(channel_id)) as minLength from common_channel where device_id = #{deviceId} and del_flag = '0'

select s.channel_id as channelId, d.device_id as deviceId, d.device_name as deviceName, m.scene_model_id as sceneModelId, m.scene_model_name as sceneModelName from common_channel s left join iot_sip_relation sr on s.channel_sip_id = sr.channel_id left join iot_device d on sr.re_device_id = d.device_id left join scene_model m on m.scene_model_id = sr.re_scene_model_id where s.channel_id = #{channelId} and s.del_flag = '0' and d.del_flag = '0' and m.del_flag = '0'

select sc.id, sr.re_device_id, sc.channel_name, sc.device_id, sc.channel_id, sc.status, sc.play_url, sc.proxy_url from iot_device d left join iot_sip_relation sr on d.device_id = sr.re_device_id left join common_channel sc on sr.channel_id = sc.channel_id where d.del_flag = 0 and sc.del_flag = 0 and d.serial_number = #{serialNumber}

select sc.id, sr.re_device_id, sc.channel_name, sc.device_id, sc.channel_id, sc.status, sc.play_url, sc.proxy_url from iot_sip_relation sr left join common_channel sc on sr.channel_id = sc.channel_id where sc.del_flag = 0 and sr.re_scene_model_id = #{sceneModelId}
